packetManifest.title: W3C Cool URIs web article source packet
packetManifest.scope: Represents one public W3C web article about persistent URI design. Does not endorse W3C, canonize web architecture claims, or cover related URL/URN literature.

provenance.origin: World Wide Web Consortium public web page
provenance.method: Manual capture from the public W3C page; title, URL, author/copyright line, and publication year were inspected.

edges.note: The page argues for stable URI design and avoiding implementation details in URLs.
The page recommends capturing creation date, distribution status, and maintenance metadata.

onAccept: Record the packet id, schemaVersion, and source URL.
Record the capturedAt timestamp from the provenance trail.
Record candidateOutputs.citationGraphEntry.candidateOnly=true if importing the graph entry.
onReject: Record the packet id and the reason for rejection.
Record whether rejection was caused by citation metadata, provenance, evidence grade, or candidate graph shape.
onCite: Cite the underlying W3C page, not this packet, in derivative work.
Preserve the packetStatus and authority.posture as candidate.
